Title: Test creating a new post comment
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has a post reference
Test Data:
- Content: "Test comment"
- Author: Authenticated user
- PostReference: A valid post reference
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the post with the given reference
2. Click on the "Add Comment" button
3. Enter the test comment in the text area
4. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: - A new post comment is created with the given content, author, and post reference

Title: Test editing an existing post comment
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has the necessary permissions to edit the post comment
Test Data:
- Content: "Edited test comment"
- Author: Authenticated user
- PostReference: A valid post reference
- Comment ID: An existing post comment ID
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the post with the given reference
2. Find the existing post comment with the given ID
3. Click on the "Edit" button for the comment
4. Edit the comment content to "Edited test comment"
5. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: - The existing post comment is updated with the new content

Title: Test deleting a post comment
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has the necessary permissions to delete the post comment
Test Data:
- Author: Authenticated user
- PostReference: A valid post reference
- Comment ID: An existing post comment ID
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the post with the given reference
2. Find the existing post comment with the given ID
3. Click on the "Delete" button for the comment
Expected Result: - The existing post comment is deleted
